title: ACSS Audit Entry
description: An immutable record of a credential access decision. Part of the Agent Credential Sandboxing Standard (ACSS) v1.0.

sessionId.description: UUID of the active session this decision belongs to.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent whose access was evaluated.

profileName.description: Name of the profile used for this evaluation.

varName.description: The credential/environment variable name that was evaluated.

action.description: The access decision that was applied.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the decision was made.
